name: mermaid-to-image
title: Mermaid to Image
description: Convert Mermaid diagrams into PNG or SVG images with hybrid rendering
author: chihkang

ai.name: Mermaid Diagram Generator
ai.description: Generates Mermaid diagrams from descriptions, uses hybrid rendering, copies an image to the clipboard, and opens the result in Preview. Some compatible or high-fidelity SVG copy paths may require a browser approved from the manual command first.
examples: Create a flowchart for user login and copy it
Generate a sequence diagram showing API request/response, open it in Preview, and copy the image
Draw a journey map, fall back to compatible rendering if needed, and copy the image
ai.instructions: Your task is to help users create Mermaid diagrams. When the user asks to draw, generate, or convert a diagram, first produce complete and valid Mermaid syntax yourself, then call generate-mermaid-diagram-with-ai exactly once and pass that syntax as the mermaidSyntax parameter. The tool uses hybrid rendering: Mermaid syntax supported by beautiful-mermaid prefers SVG output; unsupported syntax uses compatible mmdc PNG output. Supported SVG output is rasterized for clipboard copying, and some high-fidelity SVG copy paths still require browser-backed rasterization. The AI tool never downloads a browser automatically: if compatible rendering or browser-backed SVG copying is needed and no browser is available yet, the tool returns a short instruction telling the user to run the manual Mermaid to Image command once and approve Download Browser. On success, the tool opens the result in Preview and returns a short message including Renderer: beautiful or Renderer: mmdc plus a Preview link. Return the tool output directly and do not invent extra file paths or markdown image tags.

evals.input: @mermaid-to-image Draw a simple flowchart A -> B and copy the image.

mocks.generate-mermaid-diagram-with-ai:
Mermaid diagram generated successfully.

Renderer: beautiful

**Full size:** [Open in Preview](file:///Users/username/Downloads/MermaidDiagrams/diagram-1234567890.svg)

evals.input: @mermaid-to-image convert below mermaid code to image and copy it. graph TD        A[Start] --> B{Is it working?}        B -->|Yes| C[Great!]        B -->|No| D[Debug]        D --> B

mocks.generate-mermaid-diagram-with-ai:
Mermaid diagram generated successfully.

Renderer: beautiful

**Full size:** [Open in Preview](file:///Users/username/Downloads/MermaidDiagrams/diagram-1234567891.svg)

evals.input: @mermaid-to-image Create a journey diagram for user onboarding and copy the resulting image.

mocks.generate-mermaid-diagram-with-ai:
Mermaid diagram generated successfully.

Renderer: mmdc

**Full size:** [Open in Preview](file:///Users/username/Downloads/MermaidDiagrams/diagram-1234567892.png)

commands.name: mermaid-to-image
commands.title: Mermaid to Image
commands.description: Convert Mermaid diagrams into PNG or SVG images with hybrid rendering
commands.subtitle: Generate Diagram Images from Mermaid Syntax

tools.name: generate-mermaid-diagram-with-ai
tools.title: Generate Mermaid Diagram with AI
tools.description: Ask AI to generate a Mermaid diagram, use hybrid rendering, copy the image, and open it in Preview. If a browser is required and missing, the tool instructs you to approve Download Browser from the manual command first.

scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run test:run && npm run lint && npm run build
scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1

preferences.name: outputFormat
preferences.title: Output Format
preferences.description: Default output format for the manual command

preferences.name: renderEngine
preferences.title: Render Engine
preferences.description: Auto uses beautiful-mermaid for supported SVG diagrams and falls back to compatible mode

preferences.name: theme
preferences.title: Compatible Theme
preferences.description: Theme for Mermaid CLI rendering (PNG, Compatible mode, and Auto fallback)

preferences.name: beautifulTheme
preferences.title: Beautiful Theme
preferences.description: Theme for beautiful-mermaid rendering (Auto + SVG + supported syntax, or Beautiful mode)

preferences.name: customBeautifulMermaidPath
preferences.title: Custom beautiful-mermaid Path
preferences.description: Optional path to a local beautiful-mermaid package root or ESM entry file

preferences.name: generationTimeout
preferences.title: Generation Timeout
preferences.description: Maximum time in seconds to wait for diagram generation (for complex diagrams, use higher values)

preferences.name: scale
preferences.title: Compatible Scale
preferences.description: Raster scale for Mermaid CLI rendering only (PNG, AI tool, and Auto fallback)

preferences.name: savePath
preferences.title: Save Path
preferences.description: The directory where images will be saved (must be a valid directory path)
preferences.placeholder: Leave empty to use Downloads folder

preferences.name: customMmdcPath
preferences.title: Custom mmdc Path
preferences.description: Specify a custom path to the mmdc executable (e.g., from NVM installations)
